body: Hi {business_name} - William, Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). {competitor_name} down the street has {competitor_review_count} reviews and a website. You have {review_count} reviews but no site. Want help? Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.
notes: PHASE 1 OPTIMIZATION: Hyper-personalized with competitor data
optimization_rationale: Competitor mention = 'I actually looked at your business'

variants.body: {business_name}: I searched for gyms in {city}. {competitor_name} showed up first (has website). You didn't. I can fix that free. William, Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). Text YES. Reply STOP to opt out.

Hi {business_name} - your competitor {competitor_name} has {competitor_review_count} reviews. You have {review_count}. Let's close that gap. Free help. William, Marceau Solutions (239) 398-5676. Interested? Reply STOP to opt out.

Quick question for {business_name}: How many customers choose {competitor_name} because they show up on Google and you don't? I'll fix it for free. William, Marceau Solutions (239-398-5676). Reply STOP to opt out.
